'''鈭歜-z-ch''' ('''kabazach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:helicopter|helicopter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-z-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:helicopter|helicopter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-z-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kabazach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibazach|thibazach]] || [[word:jibazach|jibazach]] || [[word:shibazach|shibazach]] || [[word:kibazach|kibazach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubazach|thuthubazach]] || [[word:jujubazach|jujubazach]] || [[word:shushubazach|shushubazach]] || [[word:kukubazach|kukubazach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubazach|thubazach]] || [[word:jubazach|jubazach]] || [[word:shubazach|shubazach]] || [[word:kubazach|kubazach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubazach|thubazach]] || [[word:jubazach|jubazach]] || [[word:shubazach|shubazach]] || [[word:kubazach|kubazach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebazach|thebazach]] || [[word:jebazach|jebazach]] || [[word:shebazach|shebazach]] || [[word:kebazach|kebazach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobazach|thothobazach]] || [[word:jojobazach|jojobazach]] || [[word:shoshobazach|shoshobazach]] || [[word:kokobazach|kokobazach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobazach|thobazach]] || [[word:jobazach|jobazach]] || [[word:shobazach|shobazach]] || [[word:kobazach|kobazach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobazach|thobazach]] || [[word:jobazach|jobazach]] || [[word:shobazach|shobazach]] || [[word:kobazach|kobazach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]] || [[word:bazach|bazach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bazach|th忙bazach]] || [[word:j忙bazach|j忙bazach]] || [[word:sh忙bazach|sh忙bazach]] || [[word:k忙bazach|k忙bazach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabazach|thathabazach]] || [[word:jajabazach|jajabazach]] || [[word:shashabazach|shashabazach]] || [[word:kakabazach|kakabazach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabazach|thabazach]] || [[word:jabazach|jabazach]] || [[word:shabazach|shabazach]] || [[word:kabazach|kabazach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabazach|thabazach]] || [[word:jabazach|jabazach]] || [[word:shabazach|shabazach]] || [[word:kabazach|kabazach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabazach|shabazach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabazach|goshabazach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabazach|gokishabazach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabazachn眉|shabazachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabazachnkn眉|goshabazachnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazachn眉|gokishabazachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabazachsh毛|shabazachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabazachnksh毛|goshabazachnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabazachsh毛|gokishabazachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazachro|shabazachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazachnkro|goshabazachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazachro|gokishabazachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazachmu|shabazachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazachnkmu|goshabazachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazachmu|gokishabazachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabazachsher|shabazachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabazachnksher|goshabazachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabazachsher|gokishabazachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabazachng|shabazachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabazachnkng|goshabazachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabazachng|gokishabazachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabazachya|shabazachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabazachnkya|goshabazachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabazachya|gokishabazachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabazachyam|shabazachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabazachnkyam|goshabazachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabazachyam|gokishabazachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabazachn眉sh毛|shabazachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabazachnkn眉sh毛|goshabazachnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabazachn眉sh毛|gokishabazachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazachn眉ro|shabazachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazachnkn眉ro|goshabazachnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazachn眉ro|gokishabazachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazachn眉mu|shabazachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazachnkn眉mu|goshabazachnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazachn眉mu|gokishabazachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabazachsh毛n眉|shabazachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabazachnksh毛n眉|goshabazachnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazachsh毛n眉|gokishabazachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazachsh毛ro|shabazachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazachnksh毛ro|goshabazachnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazachsh毛ro|gokishabazachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazachsh毛mu|shabazachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazachnksh毛mu|goshabazachnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazachsh毛mu|gokishabazachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabazachron眉|shabazachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabazachnkron眉|goshabazachnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazachron眉|gokishabazachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabazachrosh毛|shabazachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabazachnkrosh毛|goshabazachnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabazachrosh毛|gokishabazachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazachromu|shabazachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazachnkromu|goshabazachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazachromu|gokishabazachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabazachmun眉|shabazachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabazachnkmun眉|goshabazachnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazachmun眉|gokishabazachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabazachmush毛|shabazachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabazachnkmush毛|goshabazachnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabazachmush毛|gokishabazachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazachmuro|shabazachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazachnkmuro|goshabazachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazachmuro|gokishabazachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
